PLAN.note: proposal, design, 5 spec deltas, tasks, work-packages

PLAN_ITERATE.note: 1 critical + 7 high + 12 medium findings from self-review

IMPLEMENT.tier_note: Per user direction at Stage 1 checkpoint; same DAG topology as coordinated tier but dispatched via Agent tool subagents rather than coord.rotkohl.ai work queue

package_authors.wp-integration: claude (subagent, sonnet — partial; finished by orchestrator after usage-limit hit)

IMPLEMENT.tasks_summary: 42/43 complete (5.5 optional smoke test deferred per task description)
deviations_for_impl_review: Langfuse v3 SDK API drift: start_as_current_observation(as_type=...) replaces trace()/generation() — design.md predates v3, implementation matches v3
auth_check() unavailable in Langfuse v3 docs; auth-failure detection moved to factory level-3 degradation (catch on construction or first emission)
wrap_extension_tool / wrap_http_tool accept Any with passthrough for non-StructuredTool inputs (kept tests with MagicMock tools green; spec language targets StructuredTool specifically)
PEP 695 generic syntax (def traced_harness[R]) instead of TypeVar — Python 3.12 idiom, satisfies ruff UP047
set_assistant_ctx invoked in BOTH `run` and `export` CLI commands so export path is also tagged
Langfuse-worker compose service intentionally lacks LANGFUSE_INIT_* (only web service performs headless init in v3 self-hosting)

CORRECTED 2026-04-25 (Iter 1) — trace_delegation.task IS sanitized at emission via langfuse.py:155 (`input={"task": sanitize(task)}`); the original deviation note overstated the privacy risk. Secret-format substrings ARE scrubbed even for ≤256-char tasks. Residual concern is non-secret-format PII (free-form prose containing names) which the regex chain does not catch — that is a spec-level question about what counts as 'sensitive content' and belongs in a separate proposal if treated as in-scope.
IMPLEMENT.change_context_status: all_phases_complete (RTM 18/18 with Files Changed populated; Coverage Summary at 18/18 traced)

IMPL_ITERATE.termination_reason: convergence — all remaining findings below medium threshold after iter 1

fixed.summary: List elements under SAFE_FIELDS keys bypassed the redaction chain because parent-key safety propagated to per-element calls. Fix: force_sanitize=True on list descent. Spec scenario added to Secret Sanitization Requirement. 4 regression tests added.

deferred_to_impl_review: Empty-credential warning emitted at config.from_env rather than via factory._warn_once dedup mechanism (architectural coherence concern; spec-compliant as-is)
Module-level __getattr__ at langfuse.py:262 raises AttributeError which is the default behavior — pointless dead code, cleanup candidate
Validator asymmetry: noop.trace_tool_call quietly returns on missing tool_kind; langfuse.trace_tool_call raises (Protocol type hints make this near-impossible in practice)
docs/observability.md Stop-hook section lacks intro context
out_of_scope_followup: tests/http_tools/ — 11 pytest failures (FileNotFoundError) referencing the unarchived openspec/changes/http-tools-layer/contracts/fixtures/ path. Verified via baseline reproduction at a079754 to predate this iteration. Right fix is to relocate fixtures into tests/http_tools/fixtures/. File as gh issue with label followup + openspec:http-tools-layer post-merge.
IMPL_ITERATE.deviation_7_corrected: trace_delegation.task IS sanitized at emission via langfuse.py:155; original IMPLEMENT-phase deviation note overstated privacy risk and has been corrected in deviations_for_impl_review[6] above

quality_gates.pytest_telemetry: 149 passed, 1 skipped (was 145 → 149 with 4 new regression tests)
quality_gates.pytest_full_suite: 435 passed, 1 skipped, 11 pre-existing http_tools failures (out of scope, predates iter 1)

A_token_counts.fix: deep_agents.invoke extracts usage from result messages, stashes self._last_usage; traced_harness consumes via _consume_usage; defaults to (0,0) so spec MUST-include never sees None

B_compose_localhost_guard.fix: init-dummy-guard service in compose with shell-script localhost+DUMMY check; langfuse-web depends_on with service_completed_successfully; spec escalated D9 to req observability.14 with 3 scenarios

C_langfuse_emission_resilience.fix: _emit_observation helper wraps every SDK ctx-mgr + per-op flush in try/except; flush()/start_span also defensive; spec req observability.2 'MUST never crash' now enforced at runtime

E_tool_wrap_sync_support.fix: wrap_extension_tool/wrap_http_tool now propagate sync func= when source has it; preserves source invocation surface (no capability uplift, no narrowing)

G_noop_validators_unconditional.fix: _validate_tool_kind/_validate_op typed Any; NoopProvider drops `if x is not None` guards so missing/None tool_kind+op raise ValueError symmetric with LangfuseProvider

H_empty_cred_warning_to_factory.fix: TelemetryConfig.empty_creds_present tuple records env var names; factory._init_provider emits via _warn_once('empty_creds_with_enabled', ...); spec scenario amended to allow factory-level emission

I_dead_getattr_removed.fix: module-level __getattr__ at langfuse.py:262 removed; AttributeError now via Python language default

J_redundant_obs_update_removed.fix: obs.update(metadata=md) inside ctx-mgr removed; metadata set at start_as_current_observation only

K_docs_graphiti_claim_corrected.fix: docs/observability.md quickstart code-comment rephrased to disclaim separate Graphiti tracing per req observability.6

deferred_to_round_2_or_post_merge: D: messages sanitization in trace_llm_call — spec interpretation question (req observability.7 scopes to attrs/metadata/error messages, not LLM input). Defer for human / spec amendment.
F: span duration_ms includes obs.update overhead — Langfuse-UI concern, decorator-measured value is correct in metadata. Low impact.
L: wrap_extension_tool BaseTool bypass silent log — single-vendor info; nice to have, not blocking.
M: factory.atexit bypasses flush_hook helper — single-vendor warning; acceptable production behavior. Could refactor in a follow-up.
N: stop-hook docs intro clarity — gemini info, claude already verified docs/observability.md:181 has intro context. Withdrawn.

rounds.convergence_decision: user-directed: apply real findings + dispatch round 3 (path 1)

findings_dismissed.verdict: INVALID per Context7-verified Langfuse Python SDK v3 docs (start_as_current_observation accepts usage_details=...)

findings_dismissed.claim: v3 SDK standardizes on input/output keys, not prompt_tokens/completion_tokens
findings_dismissed.verdict: INVALID per same Context7 source — example explicitly uses prompt_tokens/completion_tokens/total_tokens

callback_usage_refactor_gemini2_claude1.consensus: 2 medium findings collapse to one refactor (gemini #2 race + claude #1 multi-turn over-counting)
callback_usage_refactor_gemini2_claude1.fix: decorators.traced_harness wraps awaited body in get_usage_metadata_callback() context manager (LangChain Core 0.3.49+); _last_usage instance attr + _consume_usage helper + _extract_usage helper all DELETED. claude #4 (defensive try in _consume_usage) dissolves into this — code is gone. Token capture is now task-local (PEP 567 ContextVar) so concurrent gather is safe, and bounded to the awaited block so checkpointer-backed multi-turn never sums prior turns.

start_span_exc_info_claude2.fix: LangfuseProvider.start_span captures (exc_type, exc_value, exc_tb) in user-code yield's except clause; forwards to cm.__exit__(*exc_info) so SDK can record span as failed. Re-raises original. 2 regression tests (exception path forwards, clean path passes None).

guard_host_regex_claude3.fix: init-dummy-guard host check now extracts host portion via sed and tests for exact match against localhost / 127.0.0.1 instead of substring grep. http://localhost-fixture.example.com no longer bypasses the DUMMY check.

guard_shell_quoting_gemini4.fix: init-dummy-guard iterates per-variable with case-glob match instead of joining all values into a single quoted string; embedded " characters in any LANGFUSE_INIT_* value no longer syntax-error the script.

resolve_model_active_gemini5.fix: DeepAgentsHarness sets self._active_model from create_agent's resolved model_id; decorators._resolve_model checks self._active_model first before persona-config fallthrough. Spans report the real model id even when the persona omits a harness override.

consume_usage_dead_try_claude4.consensus: 1 low (claude only) — subsumed by callback refactor
consume_usage_dead_try_claude4.fix: Whole _consume_usage helper deleted as part of the callback refactor. Defensive try/except is gone with the code that contained it.

deferred_to_round_3_or_post_merge: Langfuse Python SDK v4 upgrade (independent follow-up). Tracked separately — pyproject pin bump + _sanitise_md str-coercion + LANGFUSE_HOST→LANGFUSE_BASE_URL alias + optional should_export_span knob.
rounds.test_count_change: 180 → 188 telemetry tests (+8 net: 5 docker-compose guard behavioral, 3 decorator callback callback regression incl. concurrent + multi-turn isolation; replaced 7 obsolete _last_usage / _extract_usage tests with 5 callback-shape tests)

quality_gates_post_round_2.pytest_full_suite: 436 passed, 1 skipped (excluding 11 pre-existing http_tools failures, out of scope)
